CREATE TABLE SYS_USERS (U_ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, U_NAME VARCHAR(100));
CREATE TABLE SYS_ROLES (R_ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, R_NAME VARCHAR(100));
CREATE TABLE USER_ROLES (U_ID INTEGER, R_ID INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY (U_ID, R_ID), FOREIGN KEY (U_ID) REFERENCES SYS_USERS(U_ID), FOREIGN KEY (R_ID) REFERENCES SYS_ROLES(R_ID));

CREATE PROCEDURE TEST_EXEC_RESULT () { DECLARE meta, _dt any; DECLARE inx integer; EXEC('SELECT U_ID, U_NAME FROM SYS_USERS', null, null, null, 0, meta, _dt); inx := 0; EXEC_RESULT_NAMES(meta[0]); WHILE (inx < LENGTH(_dt)) { EXEC_RESULT(_dt[inx]); inx := inx + 1; } };

CREATE PROCEDURE TEST_EXEC_RESULT_JOIN () { DECLARE meta, _dt any; DECLARE inx integer; EXEC('SELECT U.U_ID, U.U_NAME, R.R_NAME FROM SYS_USERS U JOIN USER_ROLES UR ON U.U_ID = UR.U_ID JOIN SYS_ROLES R ON UR.R_ID = R.R_ID', null, null, null, 0, meta, _dt); inx := 0; EXEC_RESULT_NAMES(meta[0]); WHILE (inx < LENGTH(_dt)) { EXEC_RESULT(_dt[inx]); inx := inx + 1; } };

CREATE PROCEDURE TEST_EXEC_RESULT_SUBQUERY () { DECLARE meta, _dt any; DECLARE inx integer; EXEC('SELECT U.U_ID, U.U_NAME FROM SYS_USERS U WHERE U.U_ID IN (SELECT U_ID FROM USER_ROLES WHERE R_ID = 1)', null, null, null, 0, meta, _dt); inx := 0; EXEC_RESULT_NAMES(meta[0]); WHILE (inx < LENGTH(_dt)) { EXEC_RESULT(_dt[inx]); inx := inx + 1; } };

CREATE PROCEDURE TEST_EXEC_RESULT_BOUNDARY () { DECLARE meta, _dt any; DECLARE inx integer; EXEC('SELECT U_ID, U_NAME FROM SYS_USERS WHERE U_ID = 1', null, null, null, 0, meta, _dt); inx := 0; EXEC_RESULT_NAMES(meta[0]); WHILE (inx < LENGTH(_dt)) { EXEC_RESULT(_dt[inx]); inx := inx + 1; } };

CREATE PROCEDURE TEST_EXEC_RESULT_EMPTY () { DECLARE meta, _dt any; DECLARE inx integer; EXEC('SELECT * FROM SYS_USERS WHERE U_ID = 9999', null, null, null, 0, meta, _dt); inx := 0; EXEC_RESULT_NAMES(meta[0]); WHILE (inx < LENGTH(_dt)) { EXEC_RESULT(_dt[inx]); inx := inx + 1; } };
